info.name: Quote Management
info.description:
Endpoints aligned with `src/remote/apiPaths.ts` (`GET_QUOTES`) and `src/services/quoteService.ts`.

**Auth:** `Authorization: Bearer <token>` (same as `apiRequest` in `src/remote/apiHelper.ts`).

**Base URL:** Use collection variable `baseUrl` (default matches `AppConstant.BASE_URL` without path prefix).

**List response parsing (frontend):** Accepts either `data.records` + `data.totalPages` OR nested `data.data.records` + `data.data.totalPages` (see `fetchQuotes`).

**Tab values:** `new` | `pending` | `accepted` | `success` | `failed` (see `QuoteTabKey`).

**Sort:** Optional `sort_by` (column id / accessor) and `sort_order` `asc` | `desc`.

query.description: Optional; search across ids, names, services, etc.
Optional; e.g. quote_id, user_name, service_price, scheduled_date, status

request.description:
**Query params (from `quoteService`):** `page`, `limit`, `tab`, optional `keyword`, `from_date`, `to_date`, optional `sort_by`, `sort_order`.

**Example success body (suggested contract):**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "OK",
  "data": {
    "records": [
      {
        "_id": "...",
        "quote_id": "Q-001",
        "status": "new",
        "requested_services": "Cleaning",
        "requested_partner": "Partner A",
        "user_name": "John",
        "door_no": "12",
        "street": "MG Road",
        "city": "Hyderabad",
        "requested_date": "2026-04-01",
        "requested_time": "10:00",
        "service_price": 1500
      }
    ],
    "totalPages": 5
  }
}
```

**Record shape:** See `QuoteRow` in `src/pages/quoteManagement/quoteTypes.ts` and mock `src/mockData/quoteMockData.ts`.
